import { Menu, MenuItem, Sidebar } from "react-pro-sidebar"
import {useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"

export const Home=()=>{
 const nav=useNavigate();
    return(
        <Sidebar color="red" style={{color:"red", padding:10}}>
      Home
            <Menu>
                <MenuItem>
              Agendas
                </MenuItem>
                <MenuItem onClick={()=>{nav}} >                             
                 Criar agendamento
                </MenuItem>
            </Menu>
        </Sidebar>
    )
}
